reasoning: Article 5 has only been invoked once in history. While there are ongoing drone incursions into NATO territory (Poland, Baltics, Romania), these have repeatedly prompted Article 4 (consultation) rather than Article 5, demonstrating that members are actively choosing a lower-escalation path for accidental or limited incursions. Polymarket previously priced this at 4% in mid-October, likely capturing a small tail risk of an accident causing massive casualties. Given that only ~2 months remain in 2025 and no imminent trigger is present, 3% appropriately reflects the decaying tail-risk.
